# Skill Template

Use this scaffold for new skills.

```markdown
---
name: your-skill-name
description: Explain what this skill does and exactly when it should be used.
---

# Your Skill Name

## Overview

1-2 lines about purpose and boundaries.

## Workflow

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three

## Guardrails

- Safety rule 1
- Safety rule 2

## Resources

- `scripts/`: for deterministic automation
- `references/`: deep docs
- `assets/`: templates/files used in outputs
```
